text.tspan: Possible to reduce dimension F by min. 59 mm for all pump models. For smaller models it will be possible to reduce dimension F even further.
From LKH-5 to LKH-85 dimensional data are based on 2 pole, ABB motors.
For LKH-90 dimensional data are based on 4 pole, ABB motors.
Other dimensions available on request. ESE00263/7
